channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world

item.title: Chile's power broker says he won't endorse communist or far-right rival for president
item.description: As Chileans prepare to vote in a presidential runoff between a communist and a hard-right veteran politician, the man who has emerged as the election’s biggest power broker has refused to support either candidate.
item.dc:creator: Isabel Debre, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: UN climate deal increases money to countries hit by climate change, but no explicit fossil fuel plan
item.description: United Nations climate talks in Brazil have reached a subdued agreement to deliver more money to countries hit hardest by climate change to help them adapt to the wrath of extreme weather.
item.dc:creator: Seth Borenstein, Melina Walling And Anton L. Delgado, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Leaders adopt a declaration at the start of South Africa's G20 summit despite US opposition
item.description: World leaders from the Group of 20 rich and developing economies have broken with tradition and adopted a declaration at the start of their summit in South Africa despite opposition from the United States.
item.dc:creator: Gerald Imray, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Leaders adopt a declaration at the start of South Africa's G20 summit despite US opposition
item.description: World leaders from the Group of 20 rich and developing economies have broken with tradition and adopted a declaration at the start of their summit in South Africa despite opposition from the United States.
item.dc:creator: Gerald Imray, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The fallout of Epstein's crimes spans the globe. Here's a look at some of those paying the cost
item.description: The fallout from Jeffrey Epstein’s transgressions spans oceans and continents, from the vulnerable girls he exploited to the elite people and institutions that chose to get involved, cover it up — or look away.
item.dc:creator: Laurie Kellman, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The fallout of Epstein's crimes spans the globe. Here's a look at some of those paying the cost
item.description: The fallout from Jeffrey Epstein’s transgressions spans oceans and continents, from the vulnerable girls he exploited to the elite people and institutions that chose to get involved, cover it up — or look away.
item.dc:creator: Laurie Kellman, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Key elements in Trump’s 28-point peace proposal and why much of it is unacceptable for Ukraine
item.description: An American proposal to end the war in Ukraine puts the country in a delicate diplomatic position — caught between placating its most important ally, the United States, and not capitulating to Russia, its much larger neighbor that launched a full-scale invasion nearly four years ago.
item.dc:creator: Isobel Koshiw, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Zelenskyy says Ukraine faces a stark choice and risks losing American support over US peace plan
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy has told his country that it could face a pivotal choice between standing up for its sovereignty and preserving the American support it needs, as leaders discuss a U.S. peace proposal seen as favoring Russia.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Putin says health ‘fine’ after two-day checkup, refuses blood pressure test at AI event: report
item.description: Vladimir Putin insists he's in good health following a medical examination despite speculation about bruised hands and his physical condition.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China formally arrests 18 leaders of underground Zion Church amid religious crackdown
item.description: Chinese police formally arrest 18 underground church leaders, clearing way for potential prosecution and prison terms.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Germany unveils new incentives to boost military recruitment amid growing Russia threat
item.description: Germany boosts military recruitment with free driving licenses and €2,600 monthly pay amid Russia threat and Trump's defense spending pressure on Europe.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
